title: Creating trend line charts
excerpt: How do you create a line chart for a series of statistics over a period of time. In my example, I want to see a line chart of for tickets opened and tickets closed. I have weekly numbers for tickets opened and tickets cl…

posts.author: rasman57 (Bob Seltzer)
posts.cookedHtml: How do you create a line chart for a series of statistics over a period of time. In my example, I want to see a line chart of for tickets opened and tickets closed. I have weekly numbers for tickets opened and tickets closed.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @rasman57 ,

Welcome to the community!

You would need to create a chart widget of the Stacked Line variety.

The Y axis would be the count of the items, the X axis the columns you want to use (perhaps creation/close date?), and then you could stack by board (I assume the closed tickets go to a different board) .

The result would look something like this :

image1333×583 95.1 KB

You can play around depending on the data you want to showcase and the structure of your account, what I suggested is just one possible solution.

Let me know should you need any additional help!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
